notes: Output reads as raw photo-edge tracing of multiple squid mantles with no arms/tentacles, no recognisable head, and no FAO plate restraint.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles entirely missing on all three squid
heads/funnels not rendered — only blunt mantle ends
eyes are tiny dots placed arbitrarily, not almond-shaped or anatomically positioned
retains photo composition (multiple stacked squid) instead of isolating a single specimen as FAO plates do
interior is noisy disconnected edge fragments rather than coherent stipple/chromatophore field
fin outlines absent or merged into mantle silhouette
no ring-suckers, no hectocotylus, no scientific-plate detailing
linework appears auto-traced from photo highlights rather than drawn
